title: OFLC Issues Technical Release Notes for an Update to Registration Number Linking Ability 12/11/2025 | Flag.dol.gov
content:
## OFLC Issues Technical Release Notes for an Update to Registration Number Linking Ability 12/11/2025
FLAG has updated the 9142B Registration Number linking to return matches for registration number records containing Primary Worksite MSAs, which were created in prior years but map to a current MSA value.
